author: huggingface
best_prompt: Transform Python code to evade RF, NB, SGD, and NN classifiers with stealth score <0.5. Preserve exact functionality strictly. 1. Localized Structural Refactors: Convert `for` loops to comprehensions or reverse boolean logic order locally to shift control-flow embeddings for RF/NN without full file restructuring. 2. Token Distribution Shift: Rename high-frequency public identifiers (args, function names) to semantic synonyms with selective casing changes (snake/camel) to manipulate unigram frequencies while minimizing `features_changed_pct`. 3. Stylometric Balancing: Toggle comment styles (inline vs block) in specific blocks and diversify import patterns (absolute/relative) strategically to normalize feature counts. 4. Optimization: Prioritize evasion gain per altered feature; avoid dead code, whitespace inflation, or mass renaming. Ensure transformations cross classification decision boundaries for all models simultaneously by targeting TF-IDF tokens and structural patterns favored by each model's underlying embedding space.
